datasheet.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability and each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll . Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
datasheet.name: Wind Walker (Psychic)

datasheet.text: In your Shooting phase , after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s Living Lightning weapon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stormwracked. While a unit is stormwracked, subtract 6" from the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit (to a minimum of 12").
datasheet.name: Tempest’s Wrath (Psychic)

unit_composition.text: bolt pistol; Living Lightning; Staff of the Stormcaller.
unit_composition.label: This model is equipped with

Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stormwracked.
